claim_bullets.bullet_text: Baseline score is relevant skill level + ability bonus (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.30-33).
Target score represents difficulty, set by game master (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.30-33).
Success roll 2D + baseline score ≥ target score (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.30-33).

source_record_text: This section explains checks in Sword World RPG, including baseline scores, target scores, success rolls, automatic success/failure, bonuses/penalties, difficulty checks, and resistance rolls. Some aspects are unknown.
